title: 4-Phenyl-4-(1-piperidinyl)cyclohexanol
content: 4-Phenyl-4-(1-piperidinyl)cyclohexanol, also known as PPC, is an organic chemical which is a metabolite of phencyclidine (PCP). It can be detected in the hair of PCP users. PPC has been shown to cause increases in locomotor activity in lab mice.
